ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the data was collected */,
  "date_full" TEXT /* Full date of the data entry */,
  "date_month" INTEGER /* Month of the data entry */,
  "date_week_of" INTEGER /* Week of the year for the data entry */,
  "date_year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount recorded */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the data was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Detailed location of the station */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the station is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for station maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type (e.g., Celsius, mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "temp_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the temperature data (0-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount recorded */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow, hail) */,
  "precipitation_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the precipitation data (0-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_data" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "wind_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the wind data (0-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "readme_content" TEXT /* Content of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of access (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., national, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "link_date" TEXT /* Date the link was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-10) */,
  "quality_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality of the data */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the data was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the team */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_data_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
